title: Metaltex Extra Slim 3-Tier Concertina Laundry Clothes Airer Dryer, 9.5 m, Metal, Silver, 48 x 47 x 129 cm 4085231280102039
features: SPACIOUS DRYING CAPACITY – The Metaltex Concerto Dryer offers a generous 9.5 metres of drying space, suited for various laundry sizes and types. As a versatile clothes drying rack, it easily goes from folded up to extended in a flash, streamlining the drying process

COMPACT & FOLDABLE DESIGN – Tailored for smaller spaces, this clothes horse features a slim 3-tier concertina folding design. Measuring 48 x 47 x 129 cm, it's a space-efficient laundry drying rack that collapses to 48 x 69 x 5.5 cm, epitomising foldable clothes drying rack convenience
EASY-TO-USE FEATURES – This model comes with 4 hanger holders, enhancing its utility as a laundry hanger dryer rack. The easy-action foot release mechanism simplifies your laundry routine

DURABLE CONSTRUCTION – Constructed from silver-coated tubular steel with sturdy black plastic fittings, it stands out as a laundry rack known for durability and stability, a reliable choice for regular use

METALTEX – With 75+ years of experience manufacturing Home Storage Solutions, Laundry Care and Kitchen Tools & Gadgets. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence, our mission is to make life easy by designing and manufacturing everyday intelligent housewares
